item.title: Call to Order and Opening Prayer
Treasurer Report - December 2025 Closing
item.notes: Treasurer confirmed end-of-year books closed. Audit by external reviewer scheduled for February 2026.

item.title: 2026 Budget Approval
item.motion: Approve FY2026 budget as presented with line-item adjustments discussed

budget_summary.note: Budget unchanged from 2025 pending capital campaign discussion in Q2

item.title: Community Outreach Committee Report
item.summary: Annual free dental screening day planning discussed. Preliminary date set for October 3, 2026. Bright Smiles Pediatric Dentistry to serve as lead clinical partner. Venue confirmed: Grace Community Church fellowship hall. Volunteer sign-up sheet to be distributed in February.

action.description: Finalize volunteer role list and distribute to board for recruitment
Post event save-the-date in weekly bulletin
Confirm venue setup with facilities team for October 3 event

item.title: Facilities and Maintenance Update
item.summary: HVAC inspection completed December 28, 2025. Minor repair to fellowship hall side entrance door; estimate $320. Motion to approve repair expenditure passed unanimously.
item.motion: Approve facilities repair estimate not to exceed $400

item.title: New Business
item.summary: Discussion of memorial garden expansion deferred to February meeting. Maria Sandoval offered to donate a watercolor piece for the annual fall fundraiser silent auction.

item.title: Call to Order and Opening Prayer
Treasurer Report - January 2026
item.notes: January giving slightly above budget. First-quarter estimate on track. External audit scheduled for February 24, 2026.

item.title: Memorial Garden Expansion - Initial Discussion
item.summary: Three design concepts presented by Facilities Chair. Board agreed to table formal vote until October 2026 pending landscape cost estimates. Maria Sandoval suggested incorporating native Michigan plantings to reduce maintenance costs.

action.description: Obtain two landscape contractor estimates for native-plant garden concept

item.title: Fall Fundraiser Planning
item.summary: Annual fall fundraiser gala tentatively scheduled for Saturday, November 7, 2026. Maria Sandoval confirmed watercolor donation for silent auction (valued at $350). Ticket pricing discussion deferred to the next meeting cycle.

action.description: Confirm venue availability for November 7, 2026 fall gala
Deliver donated artwork to church office for silent auction

item.title: Dental Screening Day Update
item.summary: Volunteer role list circulated. Seven volunteers confirmed as of meeting date; four roles still open. Supply budget estimate of $1,419 reviewed and approved in principle pending final cost confirmation.

meeting.minutes_status: Draft - pending approval at next meeting
